channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: During heavy rain the drains further up the hill rapidly become blocked by leaves and other debris causing sand gravel and stones to be dep.osited in the drain in question. Although the chamber is not completely full the gravel is above the entry and exit pipes and water flowing in simply flows out again down Ham lane., 5th June
item.description:
What three words location: economies.march.arm About 40m uphill from the drain opposite the post box.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Ham Road, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ponding on poorly designed road junction of Grebe Gardens with Gaun Road, 5th June
item.description:
There are repeated instances of this pedestrian crossing at the junction of Grebe Gardens and Guan Road being flooded. This is an unacceptable inconvenience to pedestrians and the highway authority has a statutory duty to ensure the highway is available for use in all conditions. I would therefore be interested in hearing your proposals to resolve this long standing issue

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Guan Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: No rain in 24 hours - water has increased or remained the same

item.title: Suspected Fly-Tipping of Garden Waste from 39 Abbotswood Road, 5th June
item.description:
On 06.06.26, a substantial quantity of freshly cut hedge and garden waste was observed deposited on the public footpath outside and from the occupants of 39 Abbotswood Road. The waste appears to have originated from the large hedge forming the boundary of the property, as the cut branches and foliage match the hedge vegetation visible on-site. The material had been left on the public pathway, obstructing part of the pedestrian route and creating a potential nuisance for members of the public. Under the Environmental Protection Act 1990, garden waste is classified as controlled waste and should be disposed of through authorised collection or recycling services. Depositing garden waste on public land or the highway may constitute fly-tipping. The attached photographs show the location, the cut hedge, and the pile of garden waste left on the public path outside 39 Abbotswood Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Abbotswood Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More fly tipping, 5th June
item.description:
More DIY/business waste on entrance to field. People taking advantage of this road with rubbish/flytipping, but difficult to spot offenders. I think the latest incidents happened either late Thursday or very early Friday morning
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ashchurch Rural, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath is completely obstructed by two skips and partially obstructed by other building materials/waste., 5th June
item.description:
Footpath at the end of Liddington Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Liddington Road, Leckhampton, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Obstruction by unpermitted skip, scaffolding, building material on pavement

item.title: Large area of broken tarmac - getting deeper and larger, 5th June
item.description:
Ongoing issue that has been getting worse for months. Previous reports keep getting closed but no action taken. Surface is getting worse and cars are cutting into other lane to avoid the surface when turning right
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gloucester Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 5th June
item.description:
2hr Make safe required Raised FH in road. S81 raised. (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th June
item.description:
Please cut back vegetation. FW impassable and road signs cannot be seen 90m 2 way lights (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped fencings, 5th June
item.description:
Someone who has had their fence replaced has dumped the old one.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
